Work Description: In today's session, I began practical implementation planning for AI agents based on previous discussions. I identified separate agents for different business functions and outlined their responsibilities, inputs, and outputs. I also initiated hands-on setup of the n8n environment and explored its interface, node categories, credentials management, and workflow builder. Sample workflows were reviewed to understand how data moves across nodes and how AI services can be integrated into automation pipelines.
Learnings: I learned how to divide a project into multiple specialized AI agents and how n8n can be used to automate their interactions. I also gained practical understanding of workflow builders, nodes, and service integrations.
